messages.content:
Question: Identify the agent with the fewest transfer counts in the last 4 quarters among those who handled more than 0 cases. Return only the Id of the agent.

## Transfer Count Policy
- Definition: The number of instances a case was reassigned or transferred from one agent to another. Each transfer from agent A to agent B adds to the transfer count for agent A.
- In the queries that specify 'agents managed/queries x cases' -- this filter applies to both the first agent that the case was first assigned to and the agent that the case was transferred to. This means that if an agent has 2 cases that was initially assigned to itself by admin and 1 case transferred from another agent, a filter like 'handled/managed at least 3 cases' would not filter this agent out.
- For cases that have NOT been transferred to an other agent, there will be only ONE 'Owner Assignment', and for those that have been transferred, there will be MORE THAN ONE 'Owner Assignment'.

## Today's date: 2023-04-10

function.name: execute_python
function.arguments:
{"code": "import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(env['data_4'])
print(f"Total Owner Assignment records: {len(df)}")

# Filter for last 4 quarters: 2022-04-10 to 2023-04-10
df['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(df['createddate'])
df_filtered = df[(df['createddate'] >= '2022-04-10') & (df['createddate'] <= '2023-04-10')]
print(f"Records in last 4 quarters: {len(df_filtered)}")

# Agents who handled > 0 cases (in the whole dataset or just the last 4 quarters? The prompt says "among those who handled more than 0 cases". Usually this means in the specified period, but let's check both).
# Let's assume it means in the last 4 quarters.
handled_agents = set(df_filtered['newvalue__c'].dropna().unique())
print(f"Agents who handled > 0 cases in last 4 quarters: {len(handled_agents)}")

# Transfer counts: number of times a case was transferred FROM the agent
# This means oldvalue__c = agent
transfers_from = df_filtered[df_filtered['oldvalue__c'].notna()]
transfer_counts = transfers_from['oldvalue__c'].value_counts().to_dict()

# For agents who handled > 0 cases, get their transfer count (default 0)
agent_transfer_counts = {agent: transfer_counts.get(agent, 0) for agent in handled_agents}

if agent_transfer_counts:
    min_transfers = min(agent_transfer_counts.values())
    best_agents = [agent for agent, count in agent_transfer_counts.items() if count == min_transfers]
    print(f"Min transfers: {min_transfers}")
    print(f"Best agents: {best_agents}")
else:
    print("No agents found.")
"}

{"code": "import pandas as pd

# Get all cases
cases_df = pd.DataFrame(env['data_8'])
cases_df['ownerid'] = cases_df['ownerid'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
cases_df['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(cases_df['createddate'])

# Get all case history
history_df = pd.DataFrame(env['data_4'])
history_df['oldvalue__c'] = history_df['oldvalue__c'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
history_df['newvalue__c'] = history_df['newvalue__c'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip()
history_df['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(history_df['createddate'])

# Filter history for last 4 quarters
history_filtered = history_df[(history_df['createddate'] >= '2022-04-10') & (history_df['createddate'] <= '2023-04-10')]

# Filter cases for last 4 quarters
cases_filtered = cases_df[(cases_df['createddate'] >= '2022-04-10') & (cases_df['createddate'] <= '2023-04-10')]

# Agents who handled cases in the last 4 quarters
handled_agents = set(history_filtered['newvalue__c'].dropna().unique())
handled_agents.update(cases_filtered['ownerid'].dropna().unique())

# Transfer counts: number of times a case was transferred FROM the agent in the last 4 quarters
transfers_from = history_filtered[history_filtered['oldvalue__c'].notna()]
transfer_counts = transfers_from['oldvalue__c'].value_counts().to_dict()

agent_transfer_counts = {agent: transfer_counts.get(agent, 0) for agent in handled_agents}

if agent_transfer_counts:
    min_transfers = min(agent_transfer_counts.values())
    best_agents = [agent for agent, count in agent_transfer_counts.items() if count == min_transfers]
    print(f"Min transfers: {min_transfers}")
    print(f"Best agents: {best_agents}")
else:
    print("No agents found.")
"}

# Let's count total cases handled by each agent across all time.
# Total cases handled = number of times they appear as newvalue__c in Owner Assignment + number of times they appear as ownerid in Case (if not covered by history).

if agent_transfer_counts:
    min_transfers = min(agent_transfer_counts.values())
    best_agents = [agent for agent, count in agent_transfer_counts.items() if count == min_transfers]
    print(f"Min transfers: {min_transfers}")

else:
